calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-17-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Alec Harrington for Nancy Schultz.

Mr. Harrington stated that he has nothing in addition to what he provided in his supplement and that the issue has to do with the amount that was paid to the Accountant. The Court noted that the Accountant was paid to do the work of the Administrator. The Amended First Account and Final Report of Administrator, etc. is under submission.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.
